Bug / Task Description: The JSON number scanner mishandles numbers written with an uppercase exponent marker. A value like 1.5E+2 stops being consumed at the 'E', so the number is truncated or the parse fails, even though JSON permits both lowercase 'e' and uppercase 'E' in exponents. Fix the number scanner so uppercase-E exponents are parsed the same as lowercase-e.
Commit Subject: fix(json2): accept uppercase E in JSON number exponents
